ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Oct-06-2022 Off Calendar

Plaintiffs Motion For Class Action Dismissal Pursuant To Cal. Rules Of Court, Rule 3.770
Off Calendar Sep-14-2022 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE:
Ari Basser, Esq. (310.432.8492; abasser@pomlaw.com) of Pomerantz LLP for Plaintiffs.
No other appearances.

Not argued. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF LAURENT CHARDONNET'S Motion For Class Action Dismissal Pursuant To Cal. Rules Of Court, Rule 3.770.

Plaintiff's unopposed "motion for class action dismissal" (CRC 3.770) is granted.

Order is signed.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr., Clerk: S. Le, Not Reported. =(302/RBU)
